description_long: This is a vintage-style record player with a square wooden base and rounded corners, featuring a dark, glossy top surface. The central platter is circular and black, with a vinyl record placed on it, partially revealing a colorful label. A sleek, metallic tonearm with a small head is positioned over the record, and a large, round control knob is located in the front right corner. The front panel includes two small black knobs and a metallic grille, likely for speaker output or ventilation. The rear side displays various input/output ports, including RCA connectors and a power switch, while the sides are plain with a wood grain texture.
description: A vintage wooden record player with a glossy black top, circular platter, metallic tonearm, and front control knobs. It features a vinyl record, wood grain sides, and rear audio ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control knobs, metallic grille, and the large round knob on the top right.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain wood grain surface and the tonearm resting on the left side of the platter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying audio ports, a power switch, and the wood grain texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wood grain surface and the tonearm positioned on the right.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and occupies the central area of the record player. It is black with a smooth, glossy finish and appears to be made of plastic or metal. The platter is slightly recessed into the top surface and holds a vinyl record with a visible, colorful label. No grooves or additional patterns are visible on the platter itself.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and slender, extending from the right side of the player toward the center of the platter. It is medium in length, with a rounded head and a pivot joint at its base. The tonearm is resting over the record, suggesting it is in the play position. The finish is metallic and smooth, likely aluminum or steel.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is not clearly visible, but its presence is implied at the end of the tonearm where it meets the record. No distinct details about its size, shape, or material can be discerned.
attribute_control_knobs: There are three control knobs visible: two small, round, black knobs on the front panel and one large, round, metallic knob on the top right corner. The front knobs are likely for volume and tuning, while the top knob may control power or speed. No visible labels or markings are present.
